Script.name: GaldamUI
Script.script:
GaldamUI = GaldamUI or {} if GaldamUI._handlers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI._handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end GaldamUI._handlers = {} local PANEL_W = 0.22 function GaldamUI.build() if GaldamUI.panel then GaldamUI.panel:hide() end GaldamUI.panel = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamPanel", x="-22%", y=0, width="22%", height="100%"}) GaldamUI.info = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamInfo", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=52}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.info:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#cfe8f0; font-size:12px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.info:echo("
갯담마을
") local gy = 58 local function gauge(name, label, color) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({name=name, x=0, y=gy, width="100%", height=26}, GaldamUI.panel) g.front:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..color.."; border-radius:5px;") g.back:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px;") g.text:setStyleSheet("color:#ffffff; font-size:10px; padding-left:6px;") g:setValue(100,100,""..label..""); gy = gy + 28; return g end GaldamUI.hp = gauge("GaldamHP", "체력", "#c0392b") GaldamUI.thirst = gauge("GaldamThi", "목마름", "#2471a3") GaldamUI.hunger = gauge("GaldamHun", "배고픔", "#d68910") GaldamUI.stress = gauge("GaldamStr", "스트레스", "#f1c40f") GaldamUI.wanted = gauge("GaldamWan", "수배", "#7d3c98") -- 클릭 d-pad (마우스 이동) — 게이지 아래, 큼직하게 GaldamUI.dpad = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamDpad", x=0, y=212, width="100%", height=156}, GaldamUI.panel) local function dbtn(nm, lbl, cmd, x, y) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=y, width="32%", height=48}, GaldamUI.dpad) b:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(30,48,64,240); border:1px solid #3a5f72; border-radius:6px; color:#e8f4f8; font-size:12px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") b:echo("
"..lbl.."
") b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) return b end dbtn("dpUp", "🔼 위", "위", "0%", 0) dbtn("dpN", "⬆️ 북", "북", "34%", 0) dbtn("dpIn", "🚪 들어가기", "들어가기", "68%", 0) dbtn("dpW", "⬅️ 서", "서", "0%", 54) dbtn("dpLook","🔍 보기", "look", "34%", 54) dbtn("dpE", "➡️ 동", "동", "68%", 54) dbtn("dpDn", "🔽 아래", "아래", "0%", 108) dbtn("dpS", "⬇️ 남", "남", "34%", 108) dbtn("dpOut", "🚪 나가기", "나가기", "68%", 108) GaldamUI.exits = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamExits", x=0, y="-30", width="100%", height=28}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.exits:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#aef0c0; font-size:11px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.exits:echo("
출구: -
") -- 지도: 별도 플로팅 창 (드래그/도킹/리사이즈 자유) — 실패해도 패널 유지 pcall(function() if not GaldamUI.mapWin then GaldamUI.mapWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담지도", width=460, height=380, x=20, y=360}) end GaldamUI.mapWin:setFontSize(11) GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음") end) GaldamUI.built = true end function GaldamUI.layout() setBorderRight(math.floor((getMainWindowSize()) * PANEL_W)) end function GaldamUI.onRoom() local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room if not (GaldamUI.built and r) then return end GaldamUI.info:echo(string.format("
%s
%s
", r.name or "?", r.area or "")) GaldamUI.exits:echo("
출구: " .. table.concat(r.exits or {}, " ") .. "
") end function GaldamUI.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not (GaldamUI.built and v) then return end if v.hp then GaldamUI.hp:setValue(tonumber(v.hp) or 0, tonumber(v.hp_max) or 100, "체력 "..tostring(v.hp).."/"..tostring(v.hp_max).."") end if v.thirst then local t=tonumber(v.thirst) or 0; GaldamUI.thirst:setValue(math.min(t,500),500,string.format("목마름 %d",math.floor(t))) end if v.hunger then local h=tonumber(v.hunger) or 0; GaldamUI.hunger:setValue(math.min(h,500),500,string.format("배고픔 %d",math.floor(h))) end if v.stress then local s=tonumber(v.stress) or 0; GaldamUI.stress:setValue(math.min(s,500),500,string.format("스트레스 %d",math.floor(s))) end if v.wanted then local w=tonumber(v.wanted) or 0; GaldamUI.wanted:setValue(math.min(w,200),200,string.format("수배 %d",math.floor(w))) end end function GaldamUI.onMap() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Map if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.mapWin and d) then return end GaldamUI.mapWin:clear() if d.has == 1 and d.grid then local raw = d.grid:gsub("<>", "\27"):gsub("<>", "\n") GaldamUI.mapWin:decho(ansi2decho(raw)) else GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음 (갯담 지도 필요)") end end if not GaldamUI.built then GaldamUI.build() end GaldamUI.layout() table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", function() GaldamUI.onRoom() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() GaldamUI.onVitals() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Map", function() GaldamUI.onMap() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", function() GaldamUI.layout() end)) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onMap()
